## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m app.validate` passes locally
- [ ] Files live at the correct `data/<category>/<...>/<slug>.json` path
- [ ] Slugs are kebab-case and unique within the category
- [ ] `source_urls` cites at least one canonical reference
